start_page.hero_desc: Experience seamless subscription management, exclusive loyalty rewards, and professional financial tracking—all in one secure application.
start_page.about_us_desc: Vastra by Santhosh Silks helps customers manage loyalty membership subscriptions, track subscription fee payments, and stay connected with the store from one secure mobile-first app.
start_page.privacy_desc: We use customer information only to manage accounts, subscription payments, service requests, and app communication. Personal details are handled with care.
start_page.terms_desc: By using this app, customers agree to provide accurate details, keep login credentials private, and follow the program and subscription rules shared by Santhosh Silks.
start_page.disclaimer_text: We do not accept deposits, investments, or public funds. The Vastra Program is solely a promotional customer loyalty membership and subscription service. This is not a chit fund, recurring deposit, lending, EMI financing, or investment program. Payments made are subscription fees towards loyalty program membership and are redeemable only for products and promotional benefits as detailed in our program rules.

security.title: Security Settings
security.biometric_unavailable: Biometric login is not available on this device/browser

security.biometric_note: Note: You must login with PIN once to register your biometrics on this device.
security.device_compatibility_desc: For the best experience in our mobile app, ensure your device has a secure screen lock (Pattern, PIN, or Biometrics) enabled in your phone settings.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Please read these Terms & Conditions carefully before enrolling in the Vastra Membership Program. By registering and paying subscription fees, you agree to be bound by these terms.
terms.term1_desc: Customers subscribe to our membership program by paying a monthly membership fee. Members become eligible for promotional gifts, rewards, and product discounts based on program terms. Payments are membership charges and not investments, deposits, savings products, or financial instruments.
terms.term2_desc: Enrollment is open to individuals aged 18 and above. Members must provide accurate registration details (First Name, Last Name, Mobile Number, and Address). Only one active membership subscription is permitted per user profile.
terms.term3_desc: Subscription fees are payable monthly on or before the due date. The subscription amount and duration depend on the tier chosen at checkout. Payment collection is carried out securely via integrated payment gateways.
terms.term4_desc: Accumulation of subscription terms unlocks rewards or promotional gifts as detailed in the Program Rules. Benefits must be redeemed in-store for physical apparel/clothing products. No cash substitution or conversion is permitted.
terms.term5_desc: If a member fails to pay consecutive monthly subscription dues, the membership status may be suspended. Defaulted accounts do not accrue additional rewards, and any stored loyalty balance will remain subject to the validation and settlement policies of the store.
terms.disclaimer_desc: We do not accept deposits, investments, or public funds. The Vastra Program is solely a promotional customer loyalty membership and subscription service. This is not a chit fund, recurring deposit, lending, EMI financing, or investment program. Payments made are subscription fees towards loyalty program membership and are redeemable only for products and promotional benefits as detailed in our program rules.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We value your privacy and are committed to safeguarding your personal data. This Privacy Policy details how we collect, process, and protect your information.
privacy.policy1_desc: We collect personal information you provide when registering, including:
privacy.policy1_point1: Contact details (Name, Address, Mobile number, Email)
privacy.policy1_point3: Device data (IP address, operating system, app statistics)
privacy.policy2_desc: Your data is used strictly to:
privacy.policy2_point1: Authenticate your identity and secure access
privacy.policy2_point3: Coordinate and award promotional gifts and rewards
privacy.policy2_point4: Deliver customer support and respond to queries
privacy.policy3_desc: We implement state-of-the-art security measures, including database rules, end-to-end HTTPS transmission, and industry-standard payment processors (Razorpay) to encrypt and secure transaction coordinates.
privacy.policy4_desc: The app does not utilize intrusive third-party trackers. Standard session variables and localized secure key/value storage are used exclusively for keeping you logged in.
privacy.policy5_desc: We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal data to outside parties. This excludes trusted third parties assisting us in operating the platform or executing payments (such as payment gateways), so long as those parties agree to keep this information strictly confidential.
privacy.disclaimer_desc: We do not accept deposits, investments, or public funds. The Vastra Program is solely a promotional customer loyalty membership and subscription service. This is not a chit fund, recurring deposit, lending, EMI financing, or investment program. Payments made are subscription fees towards loyalty program membership and are redeemable only for products and promotional benefits as detailed in our program rules.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: Please review our refund and redemption terms before confirming any subscription fee payments.
refund.policy1_desc: Payments made towards the Vastra Membership Program represent subscription charges for promotional benefits, store loyalty access, and rewards. These fees are non-refundable in cash once paid.
refund.policy2_desc: In lieu of cash refunds, all accumulated subscription value can be redeemed towards purchasing clothing, textiles, and apparel products from our physical Santhosh Silks store.
refund.policy3_desc: Any complimentary gift, reward points, or promotional benefits allocated during the membership lifecycle cannot be exchanged, returned, or converted to cash or credit.
refund.policy4_desc: To redeem your subscription rewards, visit our physical branch in Hosur. Present your active member ID/profile from the Vastra mobile application at the billing counter to apply your benefits.

rules.title: Program Rules
rules.intro: Welcome to the Vastra Loyalty Membership Program. Please review the program rules below:
rules.rule1_desc: We offer several membership tiers (e.g. ₹500, ₹1000, ₹2000, or ₹5000 per month). You can select a tier when subscribing.
rules.rule2_desc: Subscriptions operate on a defined term as per scheme duration. Members pay their subscription fee monthly.
rules.rule3_desc: Upon successfully completing the subscription term, members become eligible for promotional gifts, purchase bonuses, or special discounts equivalent to one month's subscription value or specific reward gifts, redeemable exclusively for products at Santhosh Silks.
rules.rule4_desc: Rewards must be redeemed at the physical store in Hosur. No cash refunds or money returns are provided.
rules.rule5_desc: Membership subscription dues should be paid on or before the due date. A delay of more than 30 days (a month) may postpone the completion milestone.

about.title: About Us
about.who_we_are_desc1: Santhosh Silks is a premier fashion and retail destination located in Hosur, Tamil Nadu. We specialize in offering a curated collection of high-quality clothing, textiles, and lifestyle products designed to meet the diverse tastes of our customers.
about.who_we_are_desc2: Our brand is dedicated to delivering excellence in product design, customer support, and value. We constantly innovate to provide a modern, seamless shopping experience through our physical stores and our digital membership platform, Vastra.
about.program_desc1: The Vastra app is a digital portal for our exclusive customer loyalty and membership program. By subscribing to our monthly membership tiers, members gain access to special discounts, customized reward points, and seasonal promotional gifts.
about.program_desc2: This program is designed solely to enhance customer loyalty, engagement, and satisfaction. It allows members to easily track their subscription status, redeem rewards, and stay informed about our latest collections and store offerings.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.whatsapp_hint: Opens WhatsApp with your message pre-filled — quick and easy!
contact.subject: Subject
contact.alert_empty_message: Please type a message before sending.

stores.title: Our Stores
stores.intro: Visit any of our physical stores to explore our exclusive collections and speak with our experts.
